name: l7_hole_collapse_mode_gate_85
description: Switch to survive mode once hole count enters collapse territory so line-greedy behavior is suppressed in terminal-risk states.
llm_notes: Failure episodes average 99.66 holes vs 75.22 in successes (delta 24.44), while max height differs by only 0.41 (20.00 vs 19.59), so hole-threshold gating should separate collapse trajectories earlier than height-only logic.

name: l7_opening_hole_penalty_0_24
description: Apply stronger hole suppression through the first 24 pieces to stabilize the fragile opening-to-midgame transition.
llm_notes: Failures end after only 23.23 pieces on average with 99.66 holes, and outlier success openings show lower early holes (78.8) than baseline early holes (85.7), supporting a longer early discipline window.

name: l7_surface_volatility_brake_critical_height_80
description: Keep bumpiness control but intensify it only in critical-height states to avoid over-penalizing safe boards.
llm_notes: Bumpiness is the largest separator (7.92 failure vs 1.44 success, delta 6.48), and level-7 average height is already 19.63, so a high-height mode gate should focus anti-volatility behavior where deaths cluster.
